response.justification: The candidate is an experienced senior full-stack engineer, but the profile does not match the role's mandatory requirements. C++ exposure is limited to roughly six months at National Instruments in 2014–2015 and an academic project, falling well short of the 5–10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows the role demands. There is no SQL Server or Oracle experience listed, and no fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain background. The candidate's strengths (TypeScript/Node.js, DLang, GIS, AI tooling) are in unrelated domains.
strengths: Long, varied senior-level engineering career with strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Brief prior exposure to C/C++ at National Instruments on a developer-tooling product
Excellent written communication, public speaking, and workshop delivery experience
concerns: Lacks the required 5–10 years of professional C++ development on Windows
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MongoDB/MySQL
No fixed income, derivatives, capital markets, or investment banking domain exposure

key_factors.factor: No capital markets / fixed income domain background
